name: scheduling_app
description: Replaces Canvas's built-in scheduling modal with a custom appointment-booking UI built entirely from SDK building blocks. A reference implementation of the `scheduling` application type for developers who need to customize the scheduling experience.

protocols.description: Overrides the built-in scheduling modal at every scheduling entry point.

handlers.description: Serves the scheduling application page, echoing the received context.
On appointment creation, expands a recurring series: reads the recurrence rule stamped on the parent and creates the linked child appointments.
